problem id: a8887238
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  01101111 -> 01111110
  11110110 -> 10111111
  00100111 -> 00111010
  01011111 -> 11111101
  00000111 -> 00111000
  10010011 -> 10010001
  11111101 -> 11100111
  00010011 -> 10011001
  10010111 -> 10110001

query: 10000100
predicted answer: 00101000
